title: SquatShield
description: SquatShield is a Fabric client-side mod that changes the shield blocking trigger from right-click to the sneak key (default Shift), aligning with the common control scheme used in Bedrock Edition.
body: SquatShield is a Fabric client-side mod that changes the shield blocking trigger from right-click to the sneak key (default Shift), bringing it in line with the common control habits of Bedrock Edition.
